content.en:
The primeval eternal true body technique, the top primeval art, has the effect of forming a strong defense, as well as a certain increase in strength.

Once you practice the Ancient Eternal True Body Technique, your life-saving ability is very powerful!

If Ye Tian had cultivated a top-notch Ancient Technique like the Ancient Eternal True Body Technique, even if he encountered a bone transformation realm that was even stronger than him, it would be difficult to break his defenses.

"Just cultivate the Ancient Eternal True Body Technique!"

Ye Tian confirmed.

After that, he began to practice continuously.

Again, this time it was still a failure after failure.

After all, it was more difficult to practice the second Ancient Eternal True Body Technique, but after a period of time, he had successfully practiced the Ancient Eternal True Body Technique, and it took much less time.

"This is an ancient-level ancestor that fits me!

Ye Tian was surprised.

Before, it was so difficult for him to cultivate the Ancient God and Demon Spear because this top-notch Ancient Technique did not match his primeval-level ancestral endowments, so it had no auxiliary effect.

However, the Ancient Eternal True Body Technique is the top Ancient Technique of the defensive class, and he happens to have the Ancient Ancestral Endowment of the defensive class, so this has a supporting effect.

"That's right, with the primeval level ancestral endowment, it will be very easy to cultivate the incomparably compatible primeval technique, and it will naturally be helpful for cultivating the top primeval technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, there are very few top-notch primeval techniques, and when he counted them according to the number of primeval gold leaves, it was estimated that there were only hundreds of top-notch primeval techniques, and they were snatched and scattered by everyone.

With the total number of primeval techniques that he and other vests can come into contact with, it is estimated that there are more than fifty top-notch primeval arts, and there are not many top-notch primeval techniques that can be contracted with himself.

After all, there weren't many primordial-level ancestral endowments on his body, and he couldn't cover all the types.

"Those Bone Transformation Realm Ancient-level geniuses who have the Primordial-level Ancestral Endowment will probably also look for the top-notch Ancient Technique that fits their own Ancient-level Ancestral Endowment, but if they want to practice, they have to fail many times before they can practice, and they probably don't dare to cultivate. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Then, he began to cultivate the third top-notch Ancient Technique, the Ancient Realm Technique!

This can be regarded as the top primeval technique of the speed class.

And Ye Tian also has a speed-like primeval-level ancestral endowment, although it may not be a special fit with the primeval realm technique, it can also make it much less difficult for him to cultivate the primeval realm technique.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the Ancient Realm Technique.

"There's not enough ancient gold! I'm going to have to get some!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Cultivating the top-notch primeval technique also requires primeval golden blood, originally he stored a large amount of primeval golden blood, but he couldn't stop him from cultivating like this!

As a result, his primeval golden blood was about to run out.

With Ye Tian's current strength and status and the ability of the three vests, it was not difficult to collect the primeval golden blood.

It's just that now that there is a top-notch primeval technique, the value of the primeval gold blood has skyrocketed a lot.

Of course, he didn't care about the cost.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had collected a lot of primeval golden blood and continued to cultivate the primeval realm.

After a long time, the primeval realm has also been successfully practiced.

In this way, Ye Tian possessed three top-notch primeval techniques, and his strength could be said to have skyrocketed.

In the years that followed, he was also trying his best to find the top primeval technique that fit his primeval-level ancestral endowment, and if he couldn't find it, he forcibly cultivated the top-notch primeval technique, just spending some more time and resources.

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, ten primeval epochs have passed.

For Ye Tian, it has been a long time.

"More than eighty immeasurable bones have completed three bone transformations, and more than twenty top-notch primeval techniques have been practiced. "

"My current strength can easily crush an ordinary four-stage bone transformation realm peak powerhouse!"

Ye Tian muttered.

During this period of time, he hadn't heard of any bone transformation realm to cultivate the top primeval technique, and everyone's enthusiasm for cultivating this top-notch primeval technique had faded.

Perhaps, he was the only one who had cultivated the top primeval arts.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian felt the breath of palpitations, as if something bad was about to happen.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Could it be that there is a powerful bone transformation realm that wants to target him, or is it going to attack and kill him?

Rumble!!!!

His powerful immeasurable will probed the surroundings, and his copying talent was also probing, but he didn't notice any problems!

And.

It's not just his copy body, but all the copy bodies and those vests also have this situation, so it can't be that all copy bodies are targeted.

Just then, the Lord of Darkness sent a message.

"Lord of Endless, you feel the breath of palpitations!"

The Lord of Darkness.

"Yes, I thought I sensed it!" Ye Tian said in surprise.

Soon.

Ye Tian met with the Lord of Darkness.

"Lord of Darkness, do you know what the reason is?" Ye Tian asked.

"This is a warning from the origin of the territorial sea boundary rift!" the dark lord explained, "The territorial sea boundary rift has been upgraded this time, and the upgrade is an opportunity, but it will also be accompanied by a crisis. As small as territorial waters, if it is upgraded, there will also be a crisis. Only strong strength can ignore such a crisis. For example, the Endless Lord, your Wanlong territorial waters, although upgraded, but your own strength is strong, there is no problem. If the strength is insufficient, it will usher in the prying eyes or plundering of the outside world. "

"The same is true for the boundary rift in territorial waters. This time, the territorial waters boundary has been upgraded, and I am afraid that it will lead to a major crisis. Being able to make all the bone transformation realms feel the crisis, this time may not be a trivial matter!"

The Lord of Darkness looked very bad, because his foundation injury had not fully recovered, and he was only able to exert about seventy percent of his strength.

Therefore, it is indeed not a good thing to encounter an upgrade crisis at this time.

He also considered this issue when he was upgrading the territorial waters, but he also felt that there was not necessarily a big crisis, maybe it was just a small trouble.

Besides, the strength of the territorial sea boundary has skyrocketed, and it is not afraid of ordinary crises.

But now, he was still a little panicked.

Don't be careful, he fell in this crisis!

Of course, if the crisis is over, there will definitely be a great opportunity in the territorial waters.

In short, crisis and opportunity coexist, it depends on whether you have the strength or not.

"Lord of Darkness, if you are in danger, remember to send me a message!"

Ye Tian said.

Fortunately, it was the Dark Sea that sheltered him in the first place, so he would still help the Lord of Darkness.

If the Lord of Darkness were to face a real death crisis, he would not stand idly by.
